# EventForge

> EventForge provides production GPU inference capacity for image, video, music, and text generation behind one queue API. Request the models and approximate job volume you need; ops reviews capacity and sends a PayPal invoice, wire instructions, or Monero payment details. After payment clears, ops activates an API key. Custom LoRA uploads, WebSocket results, HTTP replay, and managed artifacts are supported.

Canonical site: https://eventforge.loboforge.com/
Request capacity: https://eventforge.loboforge.com/request
Sign in / account: https://eventforge.loboforge.com/login
Extended context: https://eventforge.loboforge.com/ai-context/eventforge-context.md
Integration reference: https://eventforge.loboforge.com/ai-context/eventforge-context.md
Contact: sales@loboforge.com

## Public discovery and request API

- `GET /v1/public/plans` — starting package and estimate guidance
- `GET /v1/public/models` — current model catalog
- `POST /v1/public/capacity-request` — no auth required:
  `{ "email", "company"?, "name"?, "models": string[], "estimated_jobs": number, "notes"?, "preferred_payment": "paypal"|"wire"|"monero"|"any" }`
  Returns `{ "request_id", "status": "received", "message" }`.
- `POST /v1/public/register`, `POST /v1/public/login`, and `GET /v1/public/account` remain available for account tracking.
- Automated checkout/capture routes are retired and return `410 { "error": "manual_billing" }`.

## Billing and activation

Ops reviews each request and arranges one of:

- PayPal invoice, created through PayPal Invoicing or attached manually;
- wire transfer with a request-specific reference;
- Monero payment to the configured receive address with a unique order reference.

This v1 uses one Monero receive address plus a stored order reference; wallet-RPC subaddresses can be added later. Payment instructions and API keys are sent manually by ops. No automatic email delivery is implied.

## Models and custom LoRAs

Live catalog: `GET /v1/public/models`. It includes image, image-editing, video, music, captioning, and text workloads. Custom LoRAs are a first-class feature: upload via `POST /v1/assets/loras`, then reference the filename in job payloads.

## Job API after activation

- Enqueue: `POST /v1/jobs` with the `efk_` API key
- Events: `WSS /v1/ws`
- Replay: `GET /api/v1/events?since=…`
- Health, no auth: `GET /health` and `GET /healthws`

## Primary pages

- Product overview: https://eventforge.loboforge.com/
- Capacity request: https://eventforge.loboforge.com/request
- Account / API key: https://eventforge.loboforge.com/login
- Ops console, authenticated and noindex: https://eventforge.loboforge.com/ops
